name: atelier
description: AI task/procedure/runtime layer for agentic workflows

interface.shortDescription: Atelier tools and trace capture for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Bundle the Atelier MCP transport, skills, and trace capture for Codex. The standard Atelier install eagerly loads Atelier as a real Codex MCP server. Coding tasks should call Atelier context first and use Atelier MCP tools for reads, search, code intelligence, edits, and shell work before any native Codex tool.
defaultPrompt: For coding tasks, call mcp__atelier__context first. Use Atelier MCP tools before native Codex tools: node/callers/callees/impact/explore for code intelligence, grep/search for discovery, read for file reads, edit for writes, and shell only for git/build/test commands. Treat native Read/Edit/Write/MultiEdit/Bash/Grep/Glob as fallback-only when the Atelier equivalent is hidden, unavailable, or returned noop.
